name: templates: H-8 license-attribution sweep finds no API keys, no email addresses, no Personally Identifiable Information in shipped templates
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --scan "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/templates/" --check secrets 2>out.txt && grep -E "no secrets found|0 findings" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
